name: Lupine Reeded Accent Table with One Drawer Dark Brown - Threshold™ (Assembly Required)
description:
Bring sleek, functional style to your indoor space with this Lupine Reeded Accent Table from Threshold™. This wooden accent table strikes a clean-lined rectangular silhouette and has a narrow reeded pattern in dark brown to complement a variety of decor aesthetics and color palettes. The spacious tabletop offers ample room to display your floral arrangements, photos and more, while the built-in drawer and lower shelf provide even more storage and display space.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.

Overall Width: 19-5/8 inches
Overall Height: 23-1/4 inches
Overall Depth: 15-3/4 inches
Distance from floor to bottom panel: 4-1/8 inches
Thickness of top panel: 1-1/4 inches
Height of drawer front panel: 7 inches
Width of drawer front panel: 17 inches
Width of drawer box: 16-1/8 inches
Depth of drawer box: 11-7/8 inches
Height of drawer box: 3-1/2 inches
